expectations.text: Uses Flex or Grid layout component (not raw div)
expectations.evidence: Grid with defaultResponsiveColumns and Flex alternative both shown

expectations.text: Gap specified on parent container (not margin on children)
Includes mobile breakpoint in responsive direction/columns
expectations.evidence: gridColumnSpan={{ mobile: "4", tablet: "4", desktop: "6" }} includes mobile

expectations.text: Uses space tokens for gap (string values like "200", not numeric values like 2)
Layout stacks on mobile and sits side-by-side on tablet+
expectations.evidence: gridColumnSpan="4" (full width) on mobile, half width on tablet+
